overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at dusk. The journey transitions from a commercial street with large digital billboards, through a narrow industrial alley, into a wide modern plaza with orange paving and multi-level commercial buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with digital billboards

events.description: moves from shadowed building facade into area illuminated by bright neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk, passing storefronts and observing the large digital billboards ahead

entered.detail: building facades with glowing cyan and purple neon signage
large illuminated advertisement screen displaying animated content
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings across the street
metal scaffolding structure on distant building under construction

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a concrete sidewalk next to a street lined with neon-lit storefronts. A large digital billboard dominates the right side of the view, while an overhead pedestrian bridge is visible in the distance. The lighting shifts as the player moves from shadow into areas illuminated by vibrant neon signs.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow urban alley with industrial HVAC equipment

events.description: turns right off the main street into a narrow alleyway between tall buildings
continues straight through the alley following a pedestrian ahead

agents.ego_description: turns into a narrow alley and follows a pedestrian wearing a pink jacket and white shorts

notable_agents.action: person in pink jacket walking ahead of the player through the alley

entered.detail: dark red industrial building walls with small windows
large external HVAC units and ventilation equipment
green vintage-style car parked along the alley wall
network of pipes and conduits crossing between buildings overhead

segments.scene_description: The player turns right into a narrow, dimly lit alleyway flanked by red industrial buildings. Large air conditioning units line the right wall, and a pedestrian in pink walks ahead. The environment is more enclosed and gritty compared to the main street, with overhead pipes visible against the narrow strip of sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern multi-level commercial plaza with palm trees

events.description: exits the narrow alley into a wide modern plaza with distinctive orange pavement
futuristic vehicles pass by on the street to the right

agents.ego_description: walking through the busy plaza toward a large commercial complex, passing other pedestrians and observing the multi-level architecture

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car with headlights on driving along the street

entered.detail: distinctive bright orange geometric patterned tiles covering the plaza ground
tropical palm trees lining the left side of the plaza
large multi-level building with glass facades and illuminated interior levels
covered walkway bridge connecting sections of the commercial building
vertical neon sign with 'EL GUAPO' text on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide, vibrant plaza with distinctive orange geometric pavement and palm trees. The player walks toward an impressive multi-level commercial complex with glass facades and overhead pedestrian bridges. Several pedestrians walk through the plaza while futuristic vehicles drive along the street to the right, creating a bustling urban atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a neon-lit commercial street through a gritty industrial corridor and into a sprawling modern plaza. It begins on a concrete sidewalk beneath the glow of vibrant storefronts and a dominating digital billboard, moving from deep shadows into bursts of neon light toward a distant pedestrian bridge. As the camera turns right, the open street gives way to a narrow, dimly lit alleyway flanked by red industrial buildings, air conditioning units, and overhead pipes. The enclosed environment then opens abruptly into a wide, vibrant plaza characterized by orange geometric pavement and palm trees. Finally, the view expands toward a multi-level commercial complex with glass facades and overhead bridges, surrounded by bustling pedestrians and futuristic vehicles.
